sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Gilead, Arcus scrap late-stage trial of cancer drug combo
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences and Arcus Biosciences have decided to discontinue a late-stage study because their experimental cancer drug combination failed to improve survival rates in patients with advanced stomach and esophageal cancers.
